hooks.prompt: I Know KungFu honesty gate: if you wrote or edited any managed-language code this session (e.g. Gleam) that was NOT verified with kungfu_verify, you must either verify it now or explicitly tell the user it is UNVERIFIED and why. No symbol may be presented as working on the strength of a guess. If you fixed any mistakes this session, capture each as a lesson via kungfu_learn so it is not repeated. If none of this applies, do nothing and say nothing.
